message:
test(rch-common): Add 26 new tests to logging.rs

- Added tests for LogConfig default values and builder methods
- Added tests for LogFormat parsing, equality, copy, and clone
- Added tests for is_valid_level with all valid/invalid levels
- Added tests for parse_target_overrides with edge cases
- Added tests for env_filter with various configurations
- Increased test count from 4 to 30

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
